title: NBA Daily Digest: Playoff Push Continues!
subtitle: Your daily dose of hoops action for May 15, 2026

items.headline: Cavs Take Crucial 3-2 Lead Over Pistons in Thrilling OT Battle!
items.summary: The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Detroit Pistons 117-113 in overtime in Game 5 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals, taking a pivotal 3-2 series lead. James Harden led the charge with a playoff-best 30 points.

items.headline: Thunder and Knicks Sweep into Conference Finals!
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder swept the Los Angeles Lakers 4-0 in the Western Conference Semifinals, while the New York Knicks also completed a 4-0 sweep against the Philadelphia 76ers in the East, both advancing swiftly to their respective Conference Finals.

items.headline: Cavaliers Edge Pistons in OT Thriller
items.summary: The Cavaliers secured a vital road win, pushing them one step closer to the Eastern Conference Finals. Cade Cunningham's 39 points weren't enough to stop the Cavs' comeback.

items.headline: Cavs Look to Close Out Pistons in Game 6
items.summary: Cleveland aims to secure their spot in the Eastern Conference Finals on their home court. Detroit will fight to force a Game 7.

items.headline: Spurs Hope to Advance Against Timberwolves in Game 6
items.summary: San Antonio, leading the series 3-2, will look to finish off Minnesota on the road and advance to the Western Conference Finals.

items.headline: James Harden Steps Up for Cavs
items.statContext: Plus 8 Rebounds, 6 Assists in Game 5 win vs. DET

items.headline: Cade Cunningham's Heroic Effort
items.statContext: For DET in tough Game 5 loss vs. CLE

items.headline: Deni Avdija's Play-In Masterpiece
items.statContext: Led POR to Play-In win over PHX earlier in postseason. Averaged 24.2 PPG, 6.9 RPG, 6.7 APG this season.

items.headline: Cavs' Frontcourt Delivers
items.statContext: Crucial contributions in CLE's Game 5 victory.

items.headline: LeBron James's Future Uncertain After Lakers' Elimination
items.summary: Following the Lakers' 4-0 sweep by the Oklahoma City Thunder, perennial superstar LeBron James commented that he 'does not know what the future holds,' sparking speculation about his potential retirement.

items.headline: Conference Finals Taking Shape
items.summary: With the Thunder and Knicks already through, the Eastern and Western Conference Finals brackets are rapidly filling, promising intense matchups ahead in the quest for the Larry O'Brien Trophy.

items.headline: 2026 NBA Draft Combine Wraps Up Main Events
items.summary: The main portion of the 2026 NBA Draft Combine has concluded in Chicago, with teams now focusing on individual workouts and agency pro days for top prospects.
